description: Extract the latestModelInfo block (model id + migration/prompting guide URLs) from a latest-model docs source into normalized JSON.
rules: read-only — reads a docs source, never mutates a remote service
source may be a local path, a file:// URL, or an https URL (developer-docs)
absolute migration/prompting guide URLs are resolved against LATEST_MODEL_BASE_URL
output written to record_store as latest-model.json
usage: Set LATEST_MODEL_SOURCE (latest-model.md path / file:// URL / https URL) and optional LATEST_MODEL_BASE_URL (default https://developers.openai.com). Output: latest-model.json.
limitation: Requires node to actually parse; degrades to an empty artifact if node is absent or the source cannot be read. https sources need live network; local/file:// sources run fully offline.
